scene_summary.scene_description: G3 Jingtai Expressway in Beijing, camera facing south at K3+303. Two-direction divided highway with green anti-glare panels. A white vehicle is stopped on the left emergency lane with trunk/hood open, appearing to be a breakdown or maintenance situation. Other vehicles including sedans and a box truck are moving normally. Timestamp shows 14:38 on April 1, 2026.

overall_traffic_description: G3 Jingtai Expressway in Beijing, camera facing south at K3+303. Two-direction divided highway with green anti-glare panels. A white vehicle is stopped on the left emergency lane with trunk/hood open, appearing to be a breakdown or maintenance situation. Other vehicles including sedans and a box truck are moving normally. instances.description: A white car with its trunk/hatch open is stationary on the left shoulder of the highway for the entire duration of the video frames.
instances.reasoning: The white vehicle is stopped on the shoulder area adjacent to the main travel lanes with its trunk open, indicating it is parked/stopped rather than temporarily paused in traffic. On a highway (G3京台高速), stopping on the shoulder is generally prohibited except for emergencies. The vehicle remains in the same position across all 6 frames (spanning approximately 5 seconds), confirming it is stationary. The open trunk suggests the driver may be accessing the vehicle or dealing with a situation, but regardless, this constitutes illegal parking on the highway shoulder as it is not a designated parking area and appears to be a non-emergency stop.

event_results.summary: Illegal parking detected: A white car is stationary on the left shoulder of the highway with its trunk open for the entire observed duration (approximately 5 seconds). This is not a designated parking area on the G3 Jingtai Expressway.
No Emergency Lane Occupancy Detection (0 instance(s))

instances.description: White sedan stationary on emergency shoulder with trunk open for entire observation period, consistent with a stalled vehicle or breakdown
instances.reasoning: Vehicle breakdowns are explicitly included in the traffic incident definition. The white car is stationary on the emergency shoulder with its trunk open for at least 5 seconds while other traffic flows normally. This pattern is characteristic of a vehicle experiencing mechanical issues. No collision damage, smoke, or debris is visible, so this is classified as a breakdown/stall rather than a collision.

event_results.summary: A white sedan is stopped on the emergency shoulder with its trunk open for the entire observed period (14:38:48 to 14:38:53), consistent with a vehicle breakdown or stalled vehicle condition. No collision, smoke, fire, or debris observed.
No Person Presence in Highway detected in the video.
